caption: A man sits in a studio setting, wearing a black hoodie with "BOSS" written in gold lettering, a white baseball cap, and over-ear headphones. He is positioned behind a desk featuring a professional microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a white wall displays a recurring logo with five gold stars and the text "UNIQUE HUSTLE," along with a blue banner that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!" and a large red and white "BOSS TALK 101" logo. The man holds a smartphone in both hands, looking down at the screen in the initial frames. As the sequence progresses, he begins to speak, his mouth opening and his gaze shifting slightly as he interacts with the device. A black branded item with "BOSS TALK 101" is visible on the desk in front of him.
